name: morkit
description: Mor's all-in-one toolkit — spec workflow (propose/review/archive) + brainstorming/execute/TDD skills + 5-specialist deep code review + BrSE document generation. Codex variant: skills-codex/ and hooks-codex.json (Claude Code source folders skills/ and hooks/hooks.json kept for backward compat).

interface.shortDescription: Spec workflow + deep code review + BrSE document generation for Codex
interface.longDescription: All-in-one Codex CLI toolkit. Consolidates: spec workflow (propose/review/archive) + brainstorming/writing-plans/executing-plans/TDD/subagent-driven-development skills + 5-specialist parallel code review (deep-review) + BrSE document generation (docs-hero — SRS/API/DB/architecture). Single /morkit:* namespace. Vocab-translated from Claude Code source via deterministic sync — see plugins/morkit/codex/vocab-map.yaml.
defaultPrompt: Bắt đầu propose spec change mới cho feature X
Chạy deep-review cho diff hiện tại
Generate SRS/API docs cho project này
